matched.detector: i consent to receiving sms/text messages from maigrate regarding my application and recruitment process (e.g. interview scheduling, status updates, and next steps). i understand that message and data rates may apply, message frequency varies, and my information will never be shared or sold to third parties. i may opt out at any time by replying stop, or contact maigrate directly with any data privacy questions.
matched.ai: I consent to receiving SMS/text messages from Maigrate regarding my application and recruitment process (e.g. interview scheduling, status updates, and next steps). I understand that message and data rates may apply, message frequency varies, and my information will never be shared or sold to third parties. I may opt out at any time by replying STOP, or contact Maigrate directly with any data privacy questions.

ai_only: Upload your resume here to autofill key application fields.

ai.notes: The form uses a custom SPA structure. The resume upload field appears twice (once for autofill, once as a required field). The SMS consent is captured via both a radio group and a checkbox field.
